languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

languages.text: "Солидарен, госпожа Хейдари. Боюсь, что даже моего мастерства не хватило бы на то, чтобы восстановить нашу телесную целостность в случае провала".
"I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."
languages.original_text: "Солидарен, госпожа Хейдари. Боюсь, что даже моего мастерства не хватило бы на то, чтобы восстановить нашу телесную целостность в случае провала".

languages.text: «Estoy de acuerdo, señora Heydari. Me temo que incluso mis habilidades no habrían bastado para restaurar nuestra integridad corporal de haber fracasado».
languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy de acuerdo, señora Heydari. Me temo que incluso mis habilidades no habrían bastado para restaurar nuestra integridad corporal de haber fracasado».

languages.text: 「同感です、ヘイダリ女史。万一我々が失敗していたら、我々の肉体の完全性を回復するには、私の技術をもってしても及ばなかったでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

traits.locale_text: 「同感です、ヘイダリ女史。万一我々が失敗していたら、我々の肉体の完全性を回復するには、私の技術をもってしても及ばなかったでしょう」

languages.text: “我同意，海达利女士。一旦我们失败，即使以我的技术，恐怕也不足以恢复我们躯体的完整。”
languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

traits.locale_text: “我同意，海达利女士。一旦我们失败，即使以我的技术，恐怕也不足以恢复我们躯体的完整。”

languages.text: "Ich stimme Euch zu, Meisterin Heydari. Ich fürchte, selbst meine Fähigkeiten hätten unsere körperliche Integrität nicht wiederherstellen können, wenn wir versagt hätten."
languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

traits.locale_text: "Ich stimme Euch zu, Meisterin Heydari. Ich fürchte, selbst meine Fähigkeiten hätten unsere körperliche Integrität nicht wiederherstellen können, wenn wir versagt hätten."

languages.text: « Je suis d'accord, maîtresse Heydari. Si nous avions échoué, je crains que mes compétences se seraient révélées insuffisantes à restaurer notre intégrité corporelle. »
languages.original_text: "I concur, Mistress Heydari. I fear that even my skills would have been insufficient to restore our corporeal integrity had we failed."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis d'accord, maîtresse Heydari. Si nous avions échoué, je crains que mes compétences se seraient révélées insuffisantes à restaurer notre intégrité corporelle. »

languages.text: "Katılıyorum Üstat Heydari. Korkarım başarısız olsaydık benim yeteneklerim bile bedensel bütünlüğümüzü yeniden sağlamaya yetmezdi."
